title: App Settings - General - About - New update available
scenario: Verify that the About section displays update information and handles Release Notes and Update interactions correctly when an app update is available.
steps: Ensure an app update is available on the Cloud.
Navigate to App Settings > General > About.
Tap the 'X' button to close the Release Notes.
expected: The About section displays an "App Updates Needed" message, an "Update" button, current and available firmware versions, and a link to Release Notes. Tapping the Release Notes link opens the release notes page. Tapping the "X" button closes the Release Notes and returns to the General section with About expanded. Tapping the "Update" button opens the app store page for Poly Lens.
